message:
refactor(deps): consolidate frankensearch sub-crate imports into unified crate facade

Replace five individual frankensearch sub-crate path dependencies
(frankensearch-embed, frankensearch-core, frankensearch-fusion,
frankensearch-index, frankensearch-lexical) with a single top-level
frankensearch dependency using feature gates:

- Cargo.toml: single `frankensearch = { features = ["hash", "lexical"] }`
  replaces five path entries
- hash_embedder.rs: `frankensearch_embed::*` -> `frankensearch::*`
- query.rs: merge imports from frankensearch_core, frankensearch_fusion,
  and frankensearch_lexical into `frankensearch::*` and
  `frankensearch::lexical::*`
- vector_index.rs: `frankensearch_index::*` -> `frankensearch::index::*`
- lib.rs: set max_limit to 0 (no hard cap) in capabilities output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
